counters.description: i ban jax 100% of the times i play, it is literally the most difficult pick to play udyr, since he can dodge your basics and improved q and delete you in those 2.5 seconds that his e lasts, your only option against him is to wait for him to spend your e and go all in, play around your team and avoid fighting 1 vs 1.

another big problem with udyr, udyr is known to be one of the best fighters in the whole game, but that is useless if the enemy has immortality for 5 seconds, if the trynda is good as soon as he fights you he will use r, for he can't afford to eat your improved q because you would delete it, these 5 seconds are enough to chase you and kill you, try to make him spend r and run, or delete it before he uses it, but this is almost impossible when a trynda is well and know the damage you have.

in early it's a piece of cake and you can abuse it, but after 400 stacks you must prepare for the worst, the problem is not so much that it's super tanky and that it has infinite damage, if not its w, it prevents you from being able to kill it before it he does it first, it is not an impossible duel but it is very difficult, i recommend arming yourself with scimitar to take away his w and hit him with everything, and all that remains is to pray that the damage is enough to kill him with a combo, if not .. goodbye udyr .

this fight is very situational. don't fight 1 vs 1 with him until you have at least 3 items, after that it is possible to kill him, but the fight will be long and he has enough cc to entertain you and his team arrives and kills you, so be very careful.

again very situational. you can easily take her out with an enhanced q, but if kayle is good she will block the damage and then kill you, so position yourself well and start with an unenhanced q, if she doesn't ulte throw your enhanced q, if she ulte, run for a few seconds, and then kill her again.
